## Type

## Checklist

- [ ] `LoadTest` prints `LOAD OK` (`AutoHotkey64.exe /ErrorStdOut tests\LoadTest.ahk`)
- [ ] `SmokeTest` prints `ALL PASS` (`AutoHotkey64.exe /ErrorStdOut tests\SmokeTest.ahk`)
- [ ] Any new tunable lives in `Config.ahk`
- [ ] Invariants preserved: clipboard restored, single-word only, no pronunciation, HTTPS only, no disk persistence
- [ ] Manually tested in a browser and a PDF reader
